HMMERutils 0.99.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Perform a hmmsearch search of a protein alignment against a protein sequence database.

Source: R/search_hmmsearch.R
search_hmmsearch.Rd

Perform a hmmsearch search of a protein alignment against a protein sequence database.

search_hmmsearch(
  alns,
  dbs = "swissprot",
  fullseqfasta = TRUE,
  verbose = TRUE,
  timeout = 90,
  alignment = FALSE
)

Arguments

alns

A list of Biostrings::AAMultipleAlignment.

dbs

A character vector containing the target databases. Frequently used databases are swissprot, uniprotrefprot, uniprotkb, ensembl, pdb and alphafold, but a complete and updated list is available at https://www.ebi.ac.uk/Tools/hmmer/.

fullseqfasta

A logical, if TRUE full sequence fasta will be downloaded as a AAStringSet. Package Biostrings must be installed in that case.

verbose

A logical, if TRUE details of the download process is printed.

timeout

An integer specifying the number of seconds to wait for the reply before a time out occurs.

alignment

A logical, if TRUE sequence alignment will be downloaded as a AAMultipleAlignment. Package Biostrings must be installed in that case.#'

Value

A nested DataFrame with columns alns, dbs, url(HMMER temporary url), hits, stats, domains and, if selected, fullseq.fasta. and alignment.

Examples

# \donttest{
aln <- c(
    "MTEITAAMVKELR--TGAGMMDCKN",
    "------AMVKELRESTGAGMMDCKN"
) %>%
    Biostrings::AAMultipleAlignment()
hmmsearch_tbl <- search_hmmsearch(
    alns = aln,
    dbs = "pdb",
    verbose = FALSE,
    timeout = 90
)
#> Content from HMMER server:
#> <opt>
#>   <data name="results" algo="hmmsearch" uuid="3CF9980C-B838-11EC-8622-C365F75AEC3D">
#>     <_internal highevalue="1.7e-11" lowevalue="0.00024" />
#>     <hits name="4pc3_C" acc="4pc3_C" arch="PF00889.22" archScore="2" archindex="158710124293725 83333" bias="1.6" desc="Elongation factor Ts" evalue="1.7e-11" extlink="https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/entry/pdb/4pc3_C" flags="3" kg="Bacteria" ndom="2" nincluded="1" niseqs="16" nregions="2" nreported="1" ph="Proteobacteria" pvalue="-38.0097949688518" score="48.6" sindex="57516019" species="Escherichia coli K-12" taxid="83333" taxlink="http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&amp;id=">
#>       <domains aliId="0.863636363636364" aliIdCount="19" aliL="282" aliM="25" aliN="22" aliSim="0.863636363636364" aliSimCount="19" aliaseq="EITASLVKELRERTGAGMMDCK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="3" alihmmname="Query" alihmmto="24" alimline="EitA  VKELRE TGAGMMDCK" alimmline="" alimodel="EitAAMVKELREsTGAGMMDCK" aliniseqs="5" alintseq="" alippline="9********************9" alirfline="" alisindex="57516019" alisqacc="4pc3_C" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts" alisqfrom="2" alisqname="4pc3_C" alisqto="23" bias="1.64" bitscore="48.611629486084" cevalue="3.4e-16" iali="2" ienv="1" ievalue="1.7e-11" is_included="1" is_reported="1" jali="23" jenv="24" oasc="0.97" />
#>       <domains aliId="0.8" aliIdCount="4" aliL="282" aliM="25" aliN="5" aliSim="0.8" aliSimCount="4" aliaseq="AAMSK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="6" alihmmname="Query" alihmmto="10" alimline="AAM K" alimmline="" alimodel="AAMVK" aliniseqs="5" alintseq="" alippline="9**77" alirfline="" alisindex="57516019" alisqacc="4pc3_C" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts" alisqfrom="276" alisqname="4pc3_C" alisqto="280" bias="0.38" bitscore="-3.95390582084656" cevalue="10" iali="276" ienv="275" ievalue="500000" is_included="0" is_reported="0" jali="280" jenv="280" oasc="0.80" />
#>       <pdbs>4pc3_D</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4q7j_E</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4pc3_C</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4q7j_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4pc7_C</pdbs>
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4pc3_D" sp="Escherichia coli K-12" />
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4pc7_C" sp="Escherichia coli K-12" />
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4q7j_A" sp="Escherichia coli K-12" />
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4q7j_E" sp="Escherichia coli K-12" />
#>     </hits>
#>     <hits name="1efu_B" acc="1efu_B" arch="PF00889.22" archScore="2" archindex="158710124293725 562" bias="1.6" desc="ELONGATION FACTOR TS" evalue="1.7e-11" extlink="https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/entry/pdb/1efu_B" flags="3" kg="Bacteria" ndom="2" nincluded="1" niseqs="16" nregions="2" nreported="1" ph="Proteobacteria" pvalue="-38.0097949688518" score="48.6" sindex="56418786" species="Escherichia coli" taxid="562" taxlink="http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&amp;id=">
#>       <domains aliId="0.863636363636364" aliIdCount="19" aliL="282" aliM="25" aliN="22" aliSim="0.863636363636364" aliSimCount="19" aliaseq="EITASLVKELRERTGAGMMDCK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="3" alihmmname="Query" alihmmto="24" alimline="EitA  VKELRE TGAGMMDCK" alimmline="" alimodel="EitAAMVKELREsTGAGMMDCK" aliniseqs="6" alintseq="" alippline="9********************9" alirfline="" alisindex="56418786" alisqacc="1efu_B" alisqdesc="ELONGATION FACTOR TS" alisqfrom="2" alisqname="1efu_B" alisqto="23" bias="1.64" bitscore="48.611629486084" cevalue="3.4e-16" iali="2" ienv="1" ievalue="1.7e-11" is_included="1" is_reported="1" jali="23" jenv="24" oasc="0.97" />
#>       <domains aliId="0.8" aliIdCount="4" aliL="282" aliM="25" aliN="5" aliSim="0.8" aliSimCount="4" aliaseq="AAMSK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="6" alihmmname="Query" alihmmto="10" alimline="AAM K" alimmline="" alimodel="AAMVK" aliniseqs="6" alintseq="" alippline="9**77" alirfline="" alisindex="56418786" alisqacc="1efu_B" alisqdesc="ELONGATION FACTOR TS" alisqfrom="276" alisqname="1efu_B" alisqto="280" bias="0.38" bitscore="-3.95390582084656" cevalue="10" iali="276" ienv="275" ievalue="500000" is_included="0" is_reported="0" jali="280" jenv="280" oasc="0.80" />
#>       <pdbs>4pc1_D</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>1efu_D</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4pc2_C</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4pc1_C</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>1efu_B</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4pc2_D</pdbs>
#>       <seqs an="" de="ELONGATION FACTOR TS" dn="1efu_D" sp="Escherichia coli" />
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4pc1_C" sp="Escherichia coli" />
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4pc1_D" sp="Escherichia coli" />
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4pc2_C" sp="Escherichia coli" />
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4pc2_D" sp="Escherichia coli" />
#>     </hits>
#>     <hits name="4pc6_C" acc="4pc6_C" arch="PF00889.22" archScore="2" archindex="158710124293725 536056" bias="1.6" desc="Elongation factor Ts" evalue="1.7e-11" extlink="https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/entry/pdb/4pc6_C" flags="3" kg="Bacteria" ndom="2" nincluded="1" niseqs="16" nregions="2" nreported="1" ph="Proteobacteria" pvalue="-38.0097949688518" score="48.6" sindex="55721010" species="Escherichia coli (strain ATCC 33849 / DSM 4235 / NCIMB 12045 / K12 / DH1)" taxid="536056" taxlink="http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&amp;id=">

#>       <domains aliId="0.8" aliIdCount="4" aliL="282" aliM="25" aliN="5" aliSim="0.8" aliSimCount="4" aliaseq="AAMSK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="6" alihmmname="Query" alihmmto="10" alimline="AAM K" alimmline="" alimodel="AAMVK" aliniseqs="2" alintseq="" alippline="9**77" alirfline="" alisindex="55721010" alisqacc="4pc6_C" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts" alisqfrom="276" alisqname="4pc6_C" alisqto="280" bias="0.38" bitscore="-3.95390582084656" cevalue="10" iali="276" ienv="275" ievalue="500000" is_included="0" is_reported="0" jali="280" jenv="280" oasc="0.80" />

#>       <domains aliId="0.833333333333333" aliIdCount="20" aliL="1289" aliM="25" aliN="24" aliSim="0.833333333333333" aliSimCount="20" aliaseq="MAEITASLVKELRERTGAGMMDCK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="1" alihmmname="Query" alihmmto="24" alimline="m EitA  VKELRE TGAGMMDCK" alimmline="" alimodel="mtEitAAMVKELREsTGAGMMDCK" aliniseqs="11" alintseq="" alippline="99*********************9" alirfline="" alisindex="57523359" alisqacc="3agp_A" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts, Elongation factor Tu, LINKER, Q beta replicase" alisqfrom="1" alisqname="3agp_A" alisqto="24" bias="3.23" bitscore="47.3431854248047" cevalue="8.5e-16" iali="1" ienv="1" ievalue="4.2e-11" is_included="1" is_reported="1" jali="24" jenv="25" oasc="0.98" />

#>       <pdbs>3vnv_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3vnu_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3avu_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3agq_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3avt_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3avv_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3avx_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3avy_A</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3avw_A</pdbs>
